summary: A CA has warned that India's middle class may see wealth decline even with salary increases. He states that investment strategies need to shift from savings to growth to counteract rising inflation and living costs.

title: Don't let creditors claim your payout: What is MWP Act and why is it crucial while buying life insurance?
summary: Despite taking a term insurance policy, Pran Kumar's family did not receive the payout after his death due to his failure to register it under the MWP Act, which protects insurance benefits from creditors and ensures they go directly to beneficiaries.

title: Can non-resident heirs inherit agricultural land in India?
summary: Inheritance is permitted under Indian law, but state-level restrictions, transfer limits and repatriation rules can complicate how such land is held or sold.

title: How much EMI is too much? Experts say keep it within 30% of your income
